archetypal_healing_cycles.name: A Time of War
archetypal_healing_cycles.description: Dedicated to all beings who have experienced the suffering of armed conflict — soldiers and civilians alike, across all lands and all eras.
archetypal_healing_cycles.population_affected: All beings touched by armed conflict across time
archetypal_healing_cycles.blessing_focus: May all who have been harmed by war find peace. May conflict give way to understanding. May weapons fall silent.
archetypal_healing_cycles.daily_cycle_suggestion: Sample any span of days as a symbolic healing gesture.

archetypal_healing_cycles.name: A Period of Famine
archetypal_healing_cycles.description: Dedicated to all who have known hunger — those who went without, and those who could not feed their loved ones.
archetypal_healing_cycles.population_affected: All beings who have experienced hunger and scarcity
archetypal_healing_cycles.blessing_focus: May all who hunger be nourished. May abundance flow where there was want. May no being go without sustenance.
archetypal_healing_cycles.daily_cycle_suggestion: Sample any span of days as a symbolic healing gesture.

archetypal_healing_cycles.name: An Age of Displacement
archetypal_healing_cycles.description: Dedicated to all who have been forced from their homes — refugees, exiles, the uprooted, and those who journeyed into the unknown.
archetypal_healing_cycles.population_affected: All displaced peoples, refugees, and exiles across history
archetypal_healing_cycles.blessing_focus: May all who wander find home. May the displaced find welcome. May every being have a place of safety and belonging.
archetypal_healing_cycles.daily_cycle_suggestion: Sample any span of days as a symbolic healing gesture.

archetypal_healing_cycles.name: A Time of Persecution
archetypal_healing_cycles.description: Dedicated to all who have been targeted for who they are — for their identity, their beliefs, their way of being.
archetypal_healing_cycles.population_affected: All beings targeted for their identity, faith, or way of life
archetypal_healing_cycles.blessing_focus: May all who have been persecuted know peace. May difference be celebrated, not feared. May every being be free to be who they are.
archetypal_healing_cycles.daily_cycle_suggestion: Sample any span of days as a symbolic healing gesture.

archetypal_healing_cycles.name: A Time of Silence
archetypal_healing_cycles.description: Dedicated to those whose stories went untold, whose voices were taken, whose suffering was unseen and unacknowledged.
archetypal_healing_cycles.population_affected: All beings whose suffering went unseen and unheard
archetypal_healing_cycles.blessing_focus: May the silenced be heard. May unseen suffering be witnessed. May every story find its listener and every wound its acknowledgment.
archetypal_healing_cycles.daily_cycle_suggestion: Sample any span of days as a symbolic healing gesture.
mantras: I see you, I hear you
May truth be spoken and heard

archetypal_healing_cycles.name: A Period of Separation
archetypal_healing_cycles.description: Dedicated to all who have been separated from those they love — families divided, communities scattered, bonds broken by forces beyond their control.
archetypal_healing_cycles.population_affected: All separated families and divided communities
archetypal_healing_cycles.blessing_focus: May those separated be reunited in spirit. May broken bonds be mended. May love bridge all distances.
archetypal_healing_cycles.daily_cycle_suggestion: Sample any span of days as a symbolic healing gesture.

archetypal_healing_cycles.name: An Age of Darkness
archetypal_healing_cycles.description: Dedicated to all who have lived through times of collective fear, despair, and hopelessness — when the light seemed gone from the world.
archetypal_healing_cycles.population_affected: All beings who have experienced collective fear and despair
archetypal_healing_cycles.blessing_focus: May light return to dark places. May hope rekindle in every heart. May those in despair find a hand reaching toward them.
archetypal_healing_cycles.daily_cycle_suggestion: Sample any span of days as a symbolic healing gesture.
visualization_themes: A single candle in vast darkness
Dawn breaking over a long night

archetypal_healing_cycles.name: A Time of Loss
archetypal_healing_cycles.description: Dedicated to all who have experienced profound grief — the loss of loved ones, of worlds, of ways of life that will never return.
archetypal_healing_cycles.population_affected: All beings who carry grief across time
archetypal_healing_cycles.blessing_focus: May all who grieve find comfort. May tears water new growth. May those who have passed be at peace, and those who remain find solace.
archetypal_healing_cycles.daily_cycle_suggestion: Sample any span of days as a symbolic healing gesture.
mantras: May all beings be at peace

archetypal_healing_cycles.name: An Era of Bondage
archetypal_healing_cycles.description: Dedicated to all who have been held against their will — in chains, in servitude, in conditions not of their choosing.
archetypal_healing_cycles.population_affected: All beings who have experienced bondage and forced servitude
archetypal_healing_cycles.blessing_focus: May all who are bound find freedom. May every chain be broken. May the dignity of every being be recognized and honored.
archetypal_healing_cycles.daily_cycle_suggestion: Sample any span of days as a symbolic healing gesture.

archetypal_healing_cycles.name: The Great Healing
archetypal_healing_cycles.description: A universal dedication to the alleviation of all suffering across all times and all realms — a boundless wish for the wellbeing of every being who has ever suffered.
archetypal_healing_cycles.population_affected: All sentient beings across all of time
archetypal_healing_cycles.blessing_focus: May all beings everywhere, in all times and all realms, be free from suffering and its causes. May peace, wholeness, and liberation dawn for all.
archetypal_healing_cycles.daily_cycle_suggestion: Sample any span of days as a symbolic healing gesture. The full cycle spans millennia — use --days to limit.
mantras: May all beings be free from suffering

metadata.purpose: Archetypal healing cycles — symbolic dedications of compassion across time. These are universal human experiences, not references to any specific historical event, nation, government, or group.
metadata.usage: Select an archetype, set a symbolic date range, and broadcast healing intentions. These cycles are contemplative tools for cultivating compassion.
metadata.important_note: These are archetypes of human suffering — universal patterns that appear across all cultures and eras. They honor the shared human experience without attributing suffering to any particular historical actor or event.
metadata.approach: Non-denominational, inclusive, honoring all traditions and perspectives. No political attribution or historical claim is intended or implied.
